mapper.insert: insert into task (pro_id , com_id , task_name , task_desc , task_status , pm_id , task_start_date , task_end_date , created_at , updated_at) values(#{proId} , #{comId} , #{taskName} , #{taskDesc} , #{taskStatus} , #{pmId}, #{taskStartDate}, #{taskEndDate}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: update task set task_name = #{taskName}, task_desc = #{taskDesc}, task_status = #{taskStatus}, task_start_date = #{taskStartDate}, task_end_date = #{taskEndDate}, updated_at =SYSDATE where task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: select t.task_id, t.task_name, t.task_status, t.created_at from task t where t.pro_id = #{proId} order by t.task_id desc OFFSET #{pstartno} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{onepagelist} ROWS ONLY

select t.task_id, t.pro_id, t.pm_id, t.task_name, t.task_desc, t.task_status, em.emp_name as pmName, t.task_start_date, t.task_end_date, t.parent_task_id from task t join project p on t.pro_id = p.pro_id join company c on p.com_id = c.com_id join project_member pi on pi.pm_id = t.pm_id join employee em on pi.emp_id = em.emp_id where t.task_id = #{taskId}

select e.emp_id as empId, e.emp_name as empName, nvl(count(t.task_id), 0) as totalTask, nvl(sum(case when t.task_status = 'DONE' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as doneTaskCount, nvl(sum(case when t.task_status <> 'DONE' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as notDoneTaskCount, nvl(sum(case when t.task_status = 'DONE' and t.actual_end_date >= trunc(sysdate,'IW') - 7 and t.actual_end_date < trunc(sysdate,'IW') then 1 end), 0) as completedThisWeek, nvl(sum(case when t.task_status <> 'DONE' and t.task_end_date < sysdate then 1 end), 0) as delayTaskCount, nvl(round(sum(case when t.task_status = 'DONE' then 1 else 0 end) / count(t.task_id) * 100), 0) as progressRate, nvl(round(avg(case when t.actual_start_date is not null and t.actual_end_date is not null then t.actual_end_date - t.actual_start_date end), 1), 0) as avgTaskDays, nvl(round(avg(case when t.actual_end_date > t.task_end_date then t.actual_end_date - t.task_end_date end)), 0) as avgDelayDays from task t join project_member pm on t.pm_id = pm.pm_id join employee e on pm.emp_id = e.emp_id where e.emp_id = #{empId} group by e.emp_id, e.emp_name
select t.task_name from task t join project_member pm on t.pm_id = pm.pm_id where pm.emp_id = #{empId} and t.task_status <> 'DONE' and t.task_end_date < sysdate order by t.task_end_date asc

select t.task_id, t.task_name, t.task_start_date, t.task_end_date, t.parent_task_id, e.emp_name, p.start_date, p.end_date from task t join project_member pm on t.pm_id = pm.pm_id join employee e on pm.emp_id=e.emp_id join project p on t.pro_id=p.pro_id where t.pro_id=#{proId} order by t.task_start_date
